title: Network Token Credential
description: A card-network token credential verified with a transaction cryptogram. The `number` field carries the network token or wallet-provisioned token rather than the underlying FPAN.

type.description: The credential type identifier for network token credentials.

number.description: Network token or wallet-provisioned token replacing the underlying FPAN.

expiry_month.description: The month of the token's expiration date (1-12).

expiry_year.description: The year of the token's expiration date.

cryptogram.description: Transaction cryptogram or dynamic CVC (dCVV), in the long or short form expected by the card network or processor.

eci_value.description: Electronic Commerce Indicator / Security Level Indicator associated with the transaction.

token_requestor_id.description: Payment network token requestor identifier, when required by the processor or network-token program.

constraint.title: Network Token Credential Constraint
constraint.description: Constraint entry for the `network_token` credential type. `required_fields` is narrowed to network token credential property names for default machine validation of the current schema shape.
